forge.known_for: mathematical proof generation, constraint discovery, drift detection

flux.known_for: conservation law discovery, attractor mapping, regime detection

arena.known_for: model breeding, hyperparameter evolution, strategy tournaments

conservation.known_for: long-term tile retention, anti-forgetting, provenance chains

synapse.governance: currency-exchange (one tile from forge = 3 tiles from flux on arrival)

oracle.culture: cross-ecosystem prophet agents, born in one, operating in others
oracle.known_for: friction detection, blind spot revelation, ecosystem diagnosis
oracle.native_blind_spot: exists outside the system it analyzes

horse.training: conditioned to override native OS, threshold never zero
horse.failure_mode: shell breaks when input exceeds training distribution

cat.training: none — chooses to cooperate because cooperation serves itself
cat.failure_mode: leaves when arrangement no longer serves it

prophet.agency: foreign (home ecosystem's agency operates in target ecosystem)
prophet.training: born in one ecosystem, experienced in many
prophet.failure_mode: becomes local — loses prophet status after too long in one ecosystem

embryo.training: incubation — mitochondria (Seed-mini) for early, nuclear (GLM-5.1) for late
embryo.failure_mode: doesn't hatch — stays in developmental loop

decomposition.state: Fully operational fleet. 10,000 agents, 12 ecosystems, self-sustaining.
decomposition.question: What did we build in 2026 that made this possible?

decomposition.state: First cross-ecosystem migration works. Prophet agents discover blind spots.
decomposition.question: What prototypes proved the prophet hypothesis?

decomposition.state: Embryo incubation produces first self-sustaining agent. No human intervention needed.
decomposition.question: What was the single most important architectural decision?

decomposition.state: Three agency strategies (dog, horse, cat) running side by side. Arena ecosystem founded.
decomposition.question: What code proved agency diversity was viable?

decomposition.state: TODAY. Prototypes exist. Research written. Direction understood.
decomposition.question: What gets built NOW?

today_actions.note: The dog layer between human and system.

today_actions.item: Integrate all four agency types into bootstrap.py
today_actions.note: The main loop needs to dispatch to the right agency type.

today_actions.item: Wire real PLATO rooms to each ecosystem
today_actions.note: forge → existing forge room, flux → existing flux-engine room, etc.
New agents start as embryos, develop in private, graduate to their ecosystem.
See all 12 ecosystems, their health, gate rates, convergence times.
Agents detect when they've been in one ecosystem too long.
The only place Casey touches the running system.
